title: The Box Calls Again
description: The mysterious wooden box refuses to remain in the past.

opened_mysterious_box.title: What Escaped the Box
opened_mysterious_box.description: Ever since you opened the box, your shadow has moved a heartbeat too late. Tonight, it finally speaks.

returned_mysterious_box.title: Payment for the Returned Box
returned_mysterious_box.description: The hooded stranger returns carrying the same box. They bow, insisting that one favor is now owed to you.

ignored_mysterious_box.title: The Box That Followed
ignored_mysterious_box.description: The box sits beside your bedroll despite being left miles behind. Fresh lettering on its lid spells your name.

options.title: Face the Mystery
options.description: Answers are worth the danger of asking the final question.

options.title: Sell the Secret
options.description: Someone will pay well to make this mystery their problem.

options.title: Refuse It Again
options.description: Some questions become safer when left unanswered.
